positive: A highly stylized, modern minimal composition featuring a bioluminescent astronaut floating peacefully through a stylized celestial nebula. The astronaut is depicted with clean, simple suit geometry and a slightly curved, reflective visor that subtly mirrors constellations. The nebula and distant planets should use deep indigo, vibrant turquoise, magenta, and electric blue hues, contrasting sharply against the deep black of space. The composition must be centered and highly symmetrical, designed for an apparel print with strong, clean outlines and graphic fidelity. Emphasize negative space and clean silhouettes. Studio quality digital art, vector illustration style with photorealistic depth, volumetric lighting, high contrast, cosmic vaporwave aesthetic.
negative: blurry, text, watermark, signature, lowres, artifact, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noisy, jpeg artifacts, cropped, messy, gradient color bleed, logos, brand names
